core.label: R Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, vectors, data types, and RStudio.

topics.label: Installation & RStudio
topics.description: Install R and RStudio IDE. RStudio is the standard environment for R development.

topics.label: Vectors
topics.description: Atomic vectors (numeric, character, logical, integer) are R's fundamental data type. Everything is a vector.

topics.label: Data Types
topics.description: numeric, integer, character, logical, complex, factor. Understand type coercion rules.

topics.label: Operators & Vectorization
topics.description: Arithmetic and logical operations are vectorized — they apply element-wise. This is R's core paradigm.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/else, ifelse(), for, while, repeat, next, break. Prefer vectorized operations over loops.

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: Define functions with function(), default arguments, and ... (dot-dot-dot). Functions are first-class.

topics.label: Lists
topics.description: Heterogeneous ordered collections. Lists can contain any type, including other lists.

topics.label: Matrices & Arrays
topics.description: Multi-dimensional numeric data with matrix() and array(). Used for linear algebra and tabular computations.

topics.label: Factors
topics.description: Categorical variables with levels. Factors are essential for statistical modeling and plotting.

topics.label: Data Frames
topics.description: Tabular data with rows and columns. Data frames are R's central data structure.

topics.label: Tidyverse Overview
topics.description: The tidyverse is a collection of packages for data science. Install with install.packages('tidyverse').

topics.label: dplyr Verbs
topics.description: filter, select, mutate, arrange, summarise, group_by. The core data manipulation verbs.

topics.label: The Pipe (%>% and |>)
topics.description: Chain operations with pipes for readable data pipelines. |> is R's native pipe (4.1+).

topics.label: tidyr (Reshape Data)
topics.description: pivot_longer, pivot_wider, separate, unite. Transform data between wide and long formats.

topics.label: Joins
topics.description: left_join, inner_join, full_join, anti_join. Combine data frames by matching columns.

topics.label: String Manipulation (stringr)
topics.description: str_detect, str_replace, str_extract, str_split. Consistent string operations.

topics.label: Date/Time (lubridate)
topics.description: Parse, manipulate, and compute with dates and times.

topics.label: Reading Data (readr, readxl)
topics.description: Import CSV, TSV, Excel, and other formats. readr is faster and more consistent than base R.

topics.label: ggplot2 Basics
topics.description: Build plots with the grammar of graphics — aes(), geom_*, facets, scales, themes.

topics.label: Statistical Tests
topics.description: t.test, chisq.test, cor.test, wilcox.test. R has built-in functions for common statistical tests.

topics.label: Linear Regression
topics.description: Fit models with lm(), interpret coefficients, and check assumptions with summary() and plot().

topics.label: R Markdown / Quarto
topics.description: Combine code, output, and narrative in reproducible reports. Quarto is the next generation.

topics.label: Apply Family & purrr
topics.description: Functional iteration with map(), map_dbl(), walk(). purrr replaces apply/sapply/lapply.

topics.label: Packages & CRAN
topics.description: Install from CRAN, create your own packages with devtools. R has 20,000+ packages.

topics.label: Debugging & Profiling
topics.description: browser(), debug(), traceback(), and profvis for performance. Debug R functions interactively.

topics.label: testthat
topics.description: Unit testing for R with expect_*, test_that, and describe. Standard testing framework.
